response.justification: Maria is a versatile senior full-stack engineer with roughly 19 years of experience, meeting the raw tenure requirement, and her founder experience with GISCollective shows entrepreneurial initiative. However, this is a director-level IC role centered on AI strategy, and her AI exposure is limited to recent MCP/agent-tooling contributions rather than recognized expertise or AI-powered products at scale. Her career trajectory has remained at the senior/staff developer level without evidence of the strategic influence, customer advisory work, or engineering leadership the role demands.
strengths: 19+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and low-latency systems
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform, demonstrating entrepreneurial drive and product ownership
Active knowledge-sharer via conference talks, workshops, and developer tooling contributions
concerns: Minimal demonstrated AI/ML expertise; no recognized AI products or platforms built
No evidence of director-level scope, strategic advisory, or cross-org engineering leadership
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and limited cloud-platform strategy experience

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs. director-level IC role
